goal: Design production backup and reread verification contracts for the one-target pilot while keeping pilot and production write gates false.

productionBackupContract.targetPolicy: Back up the exact target file before writing.
productionBackupContract.resolvedSymlinkPolicy: Do not back up the resolved symlink target in the first pilot.
productionBackupContract.generatedScriptSymlinkPolicy: Do not write to generated, script-managed, or symlink-managed targets in the first pilot.
productionBackupContract.integrityRequirement: Backup bytes must exactly match original bytes before any future write continues.

backupPathPolicy.placement: Same directory as the exact target file.
backupPathPolicy.timestampPolicy: UTC timestamp supplied by production write review.
backupPathPolicy.collisionPolicy: If a backup path already exists, append .1, .2, and so on before .bak.
fixtureProof: existing backup path produces unique collision path
fixture backup bytes match original bytes

productionVerificationContract.rereadPolicy: Reread the exact target file after a future write and parse scalar records.
productionVerificationContract.linePolicy: Prefer exact line match when available, with setting-id fallback for fixture proof.
productionVerificationContract.normalizationPolicy: Use existing Hyprland scalar key normalization and compare the raw parsed value.
productionVerificationContract.failureBehavior: If verification fails, do not claim success; future production must run rollback/recovery before reporting completion.

proves: fixture write proof writes expected scalar value
fixture reread verification passes for expected value
fixture reread verification fails for wrong expected value
verification failure status can be represented

requires: restore exact backup bytes to exact target path

copy: The app will back up this exact file before saving changes.
The backup must match the original file before any write can continue.
The app will reread the file to confirm the value.
If verification fails, the app must not report the change as complete.
Rollback/recovery must be implemented before real writes.
Production backups are not active yet.
Production verification is not active yet.
Real writing is not active yet.

uiChanges: Added disabled production backup and verification copy below the existing first production write pilot section.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed with pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts left uncommitted

proofUsed: Contract model tests for backup, verification, recovery, and pilot readiness.
Fixture-only backup path and byte-equality proof using temporary files only.
Fixture-only write and reread verification proof using temporary files only.
Source-level UI copy tests proving disabled future copy and no handlers.
Source-level Apply/write isolation tests proving write_flow.rs does not import the new contracts.
proofStillMissing: No production backup implementation is active.
No production reread verification is active.

No production Apply integration is approved.

nextRecommendedSprint: Design rollback/recovery implementation details for the one-target pilot while keeping all production gates false.
